summary: Spike: MS Graph meeting detection — subscription vs polling
why: Polling vs webhooks was evaluated and Electron main-process delegated Graph polling was selected for Slice 1.
acceptance_criteria_met: Recommendation made; Graph scopes identified; /me/calendarView baseline documented; webhook tradeoffs documented; throttling/backoff rules documented; polling cadence documented.
evidence: docs/spikes/ms-graph-meeting-detection.md; live validation update; poll cadence immediate startup/sign-in/resume plus 5-minute normal polling.
unmet_or_blocker: Persistent MSAL token cache is a follow-up hardening item, not a blocker for the spike decision.

summary: Wire auto-start and auto-stop recording to Graph meeting events
why: Graph event detection is wired to recording lifecycle and upload metadata.
acceptance_criteria_met: Auto-start path exists; auto-stop timer exists; manual recording bypasses calendar logic; Graph metadata passes through create/upload/backend record.
evidence: docs/jira-progress.md IN-66; commits 1df29d8, 0000990, 9b74905; npm run verify:graph; typecheck; build; backend compileall; FastAPI smoke for create/upload with Graph metadata.

summary: Implement host-only recording gate for auto-triggered meetings
why: Auto-recording is organiser-gated and non-organiser meetings are skipped.
acceptance_criteria_met: Organiser passes; non-organiser blocked; excluded events blocked; manual recording bypasses host gate.
evidence: src/main/graph/host-gate.ts; docs/jira-progress.md IN-67; commit e25c4e3; live 2pm Innovations Sync check showed David as organiser so Joseph should not auto-record.

summary: Implement MS Graph meeting detection in Electron main process
why: MSAL public-client auth, Graph calendar polling, host gate, start-window gate, and duplicate protection are implemented.
acceptance_criteria_met: Detects real Teams calendar meetings; uses delegated Graph; emits eligible/skipped decisions; auto-start only inside 3-minute window; skips non-organiser meetings.
evidence: docs/jira-progress.md IN-68; commits cf2a475, a59bd92, bb33e2c; src/main/graph/runtime.ts; DEFAULT_POLL_INTERVAL_MS=5 minutes; DEFAULT_AUTO_START_LEAD_MS=3 minutes.
unmet_or_blocker: Current app loses cached MSAL account after restart. Add persistent MSAL cache as hardening/follow-up.

summary: Define internal vs client meeting_type classification rules
why: Jira already marks Done and classification rule was decided.
acceptance_criteria_met: Internal/client classification rules documented and accepted as initial Slice 1 logic.
evidence: Jira (2).csv shows IN-70 Done; comments confirm team agreed to initial rules.

summary: Configure app to run at Windows startup and persist in system tray

evidence: docs/jira-progress.md IN-71; commits a7db862 and 0630750; npm run typecheck; npm run build; git diff --check.
unmet_or_blocker: Final signed installer rollout remains under IN-81.
